headline: Bunge Global (BG) After The Zacks Upgrade And Rising Estimates Looks Undervalued
summary: Bunge Global (BG) drew fresh attention after receiving a Zacks Rank #2 upgrade, with analysts lifting earnings estimates over the past 3 months. This shift has coincided with renewed interest in the stock. See our latest analysis for Bunge Global. At a share price of $114.32, Bunge Global has seen its 7-day share price return of 7.38% partly offset earlier weakness, with the 30-day share price return down 10.83%, while the 1-year total shareholder return is 53.17%, indicating momentum that...

headline: Bunge Global (BG) Expands Global Reach As Viterra Integration Reshapes Its Network
summary: Bunge Global (NYSE:BG) has expanded its global capabilities following the integration with Viterra. The combination adds new origination, processing, storage, and logistics assets across key agricultural regions. The move increases Bunge Global's role in the global supply chain for grains, oilseeds, and related products. Bunge Global is drawing fresh attention from investors as the company folds Viterra's network into its own operations. With NYSE:BG recently trading at $114.32 and the...
